title: Low-synchronization Arnoldi Methods for the Matrix Exponential with Application to Exponential Integrators
topic: Low-synchronization Arnoldi Methods for Matrix Exponential
problem_domain: Numerical solutions of stiff systems of ODEs from PDE discretization
main_challenge: Parallel scalability of Arnoldi method due to global communication
key_findings: Exponential methods offer computational savings when a fast preconditioner is not available
For large-scale applications, evaluating exponential-like functions can be more efficient than computing rational functions of the Jacobian
Krylov-projection based algorithms are efficient for both implicit and exponential integrators
